mapper.select:
SELECT a.popup_zone_oid, a.popup_zone_nm, a.smry, a.popup_zone_link, a.thmb_path, COALESCE(f.img_sbst_txt_cn, a.popup_zone_nm) as thumbnail_alt_text, a.inq_cnt, a.open_yn, a.use_yn, a.reg_id, a.reg_dt, a.mdfcn_id, a.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.popup_zone a LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON f.tbl_nm = 'popup_zone' AND f.tbl_oid = a.popup_zone_oid AND f.thmb_yn = 'Y' AND f.use_yn = 'Y'
a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.open_yn = 'Y'
AND (a.popup_zone_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.smry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
group by a.popup_zone_oid ORDER BY a.popup_zone_oid DESC

SELECT a.popup_zone_oid, a.popup_zone_nm, a.smry, a.popup_zone_link, a.thmb_path, COALESCE(f.img_sbst_txt_cn, a.popup_zone_nm) as thumbnail_alt_text, a.inq_cnt, a.open_yn, a.use_yn, a.reg_id, a.reg_dt, a.mdfcn_id, a.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.popup_zone a LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON f.tbl_nm = 'popup_zone' AND f.tbl_oid = a.popup_zone_oid AND f.thmb_yn = 'Y' AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.popup_zone_oid = #{popupZoneOid}
SELECT popup_zone_oid, popup_zone_nm FROM ${schema}.popup_zone WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND popup_zone_oid < #{popupZoneOid} ORDER BY popup_zone_oid DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT popup_zone_oid, popup_zone_nm FROM ${schema}.popup_zone WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND popup_zone_oid > #{popupZoneOid} ORDER BY popup_zone_oid ASC LIMIT 1
